word: G2371 - θυμομαχέω - thymomachéō - thoo-mom-akh-eh'-o - Be highly displeased

sections.paragraph: சுருக்க விளக்கம் / Short Definition: Be highly displeased
இலக்கண சொல்வகை / Part(s) of speech: Verb / வினைச்சொல்
to carry on war with great animosity to be very angry, be exasperated
ஆங்கில மூலம் / Original in English: From a presumed compound of G2372 and G3164; to be in a furious fight, that is, (figuratively) to be exasperated: - be highly displeased.
